Container.Name: Mem0-AIO
Container.Overview:
Mem0 (OpenMemory) is a Universal Memory Layer for AI Agents. It provides an intelligent memory layer using an MCP server and dashboard, allowing AI models to remember user preferences and adapt continuously.
[b]All-In-One (AIO) Edition[/b] This template uses `s6-overlay` to internally bundle and manage the API Backend, the Next.js UI, and the Qdrant Vector database all inside a single container setup.
[b]Included Components[/b]: - Web UI (Port 3000) - MCP API Server (Port 8765) - Local Qdrant Database (No external VectorDB required)
Container.Description: Mem0 (OpenMemory) provides a unified self-hosted memory layer for AI interactions. This AIO unifies the UI, API, and Vector Database into one easy-to-manage container.

Config.Name: MCP Server Port
Config.Description: The default MCP API server port.

Config.Name: App Volumes - Qdrant Storage
Config.Description: Persistent storage for the internal Qdrant vector database (saves your AI memories).

Config.Name: OpenAI API Key
Config.Description: API Key for OpenAI. (Used for generating text/embeddings).

Config.Name: OpenAI Base URL
Config.Description: (Optional) Set this to your 'http://OLLAMA_IP:11434/v1' to use a local Ollama instance instead of the OpenAI cloud.

Config.Name: Default User
Config.Description: The default user namespace to create memories under for the UI dashboard.

Config.Name: Public API URL
Config.Description: The public URL where the UI client can reach the MCP server. If self-hosting remotely, update this.
